title: Support foreach looping through lower array dimension
body:
In SystemVerilog, it's possible to use `foreach` to loop through a lower dimension by using the following syntax: 

```systemverilog
foreach (array_2d[,j] begin  // Notice comma before "j"
    $display("j: %d", j);
end
```

Using this syntax in Verilator produces the following error: 
> %Error: xxxx: syntax error, unexpected ',', expecting TYPE-IDENTIFIER
>  xx |  foreach (array_2d[,col]) begin
>    |         ^

I'm using the latest verilator stable version: `Verilator 4.212 2021-09-01 rev v4.212-20-g27c08a65`
